IIT Kanpur Latest Updates and News

Key Updates4
Other Updates2

04 Jul, 2026 GATE COAP 2026 Round 9 offers out @coap2026.iitr.ac.in. The last date to submit the decision is July 6 (10 PM). Round 10 offers on July 11, 2026. Read News.

03 Jul, 2026 IIT Madras has joined IIT Kanpur to offer the B.Cyber program. The entrance hackathon is scheduled for Jul 5, results on Jul 8, and reporting by Jul 21, 2026. Read news!

30 Jun, 2026 IIT Kanpur JEE Advanced Cutoff 2026 has been released. Check round and course-wise IIT Kanpur JEE Advanced Cutoff 2026.

  • Round 2 Cutoff for B.Tech is 276-7344 for the General Category.

25 May, 2026 CEED 2027 exam date announced. Exam on Jan 17, 2027. Detailed information will be released by Oct 1, 2026 @ceed.iitb.ac.in. Read news!

...Read More

IIT Kanpur provides various B.Tech, M.Tech, M.Sc, Ph.D, and MBA programs across different specializations. The Admission procedure for B.Tech/B.S. programs is primarily based on the JEE Advanced score, followed by seat allotment through JoSAA counseling. For M.Tech admissions at IIT Kanpur, performance in the GATE and COAP counseling rounds determines the final placements. M.Sc, MBA, and Ph.D admission criteria rely on IIT JAM/CAT/GATE/NET-JRF score, followed by various counseling rounds.

For IIT Kanpur 2025, B.Tech admissions, the JEE Advanced closing cutoff is 270 for CSE, whereas in 2024, the closing rank was 252, marking a decline in the closing rank in 2025. These trends reflect the competitive nature of programs like CSE, having higher cutoffs compared to others. The average fee for the 4-year B.Tech program is INR 8.6 Lakhs, whereas the fee for the 2-year M.Tech Program is INR 1.19 Lakhs.

IIT Kanpur Admission Dates 2026

Here are the important dates of the admission process conducted by IIT Kanpur.

IIT Kanpur B.Tech Admission Dates 2026

IIT Kanpur accepts JEE Advanced scores followed by JoSAA Counselling for admission to the B.Tech program. Candidates can check the schedule of both the exams and counselling are tabulated below:

JEE Advanced Exam Dates 2026

Events Date
JEE Advanced 2026 Registration Dates (Extended) Apr 23 - May 05, 2026
JEE Advanced 2026 Exam Date May 17, 2026
JEE Advanced 2026 Result Date (Out) Jun 01, 2026

JoSAA Counselling Dates 2026

Events Date
Round 3 Seat Allotment Date Jul 06, 2026
Document Upload Date (Round 3) Jul 06 - Jul 08, 2026
Round 4 Seat Allotment Date Jul 10, 2026
Document Upload Date (Round 4) Jul 10 - Jul 13, 2026
Round 5 Seat Allotment Date Jul 16, 2026
Document Upload Date (Round 5) Jul 16 - Jul 20, 2026
Registration & Choice Filling Date Jun 02 - Jun 11, 2026
Document Upload Date (Round 1) Jun 13 - Jun 26, 2026
Round 1 Seat Allotment Date Jun 13, 2026
Round 2 Seat Allotment Date Jun 30, 2026
Document Upload Date (Round 2) Jun 30 - Jul 03, 2026

IIT Kanpur M.Tech Admission Dates 2026

M.Tech admission at IIT Kanpur is based on a valid GATE score. Candidates must register on both the IIT Kanpur admission portal and the COAP portal, after which seats are allotted through COAP counselling rounds. Candidates can check the COAP Counselling schedule and IIT Kanpur–specific admission dates in the table below.

Events Date
IIT Kanpur 2026 M.Tech Registration Date March 27 – April 25, 2026 (Tentative)
Written Test & Interview Date May 03, 2026

COAP Counselling Dates 2026

Events Date
Registration Begins Mar 27, 2026
Seat Allocation Round 1 May 11 - May 13, 2026
Seat Allocation Round 2 May 17 - May 20, 2026
Seat Allocation Round 3 May 24 - May 27, 2026
Seat Allocation Round 4 May 31 - Jun 03, 2026
Seat Allocation Round 5 Jun 05 - Jun 10, 2026

IIT Kanpur MBA Admission Dates 2026

IIT Kanpur MBA program is offered through its Department of Management Studies (DOMS). DOMS, IIT Kanpur MBA Admission 2026 is going on. The interviews will be held from Mar 13 to 16, 2026. Read More

IIT Kanpur MSc Admission Dates 2026

Admission to the M.Sc programs at IIT Kanpur is based on IIT JAM scores followed by JOAPS Counselling. Candidates can check the schedule of the JOAPS Counselling in the table below:

Events Date
JOAPS Registration Date Mar 27 - Apr 15, 2026

IIT Kanpur B.Tech/B.S. Admission 2026

IIT Kanpur B.Tech admission procedure, eligibility, and selection criteria are discussed below with the cutoff of 2025.

IIT Kanpur B.Tech/B.S JEE Advanced CutOff 

IIT Kanpur B.Tech/B.S. admissions are conducted based on the JEE Advanced scores, and the cutoff ranks across CSE, ECE, EEE, civil engineering, Mechanical engineering, and other disciplines are shown below. The Computer and Science Engineering and Electrical Engineering department has the highest closing rank compared to others. For the CSE department, the cutoff rank is 270.

Given below IIT Kanpur JEE Advanced Cutoff for 2025.

IIT Kanpur B.Tech/B.S Eligibility & Selection Criteria

Particulars Details
Application Process Interested candidates can fill out the online application form on the official website for JEE Advanced 2025 with a valid JEE Score. Later, students satisfying the admission and cut-off criteria of IIT Kanpur can pay the fees to book the seat.
Minimum Eligibility Must have passed the 10 + 2 Level Examination with at least 75% Marks from a recognized board with PCM (Compulsory Subjects)
Selection Criteria JoSAA Counselling is conducted based on the JEE Advanced Score

B.S. Chemistry, Earth Sciences, Economics, Mathematics and Scientific Computing, Physics, Statistics, and Data Science

What subjects are included in the BSc Statistics and Data Science program at IIT Kanpur?

Students enrolled in the BSc in Statistics and Data Science at IIT Kanpur will study a variety of subjects. The curriculum includes some key subjects such as:

  • Fundamental of Computing
  • Physics Laboratory
  • General Chemistry
  • Statistical Computing
  • Multivariate Analysis
  • Communication Skills: Composition

IIT Kanpur M.Tech Admission 2026

IIT Kanpur M.Tech admission procedure, eligibility, and selection criteria are discussed below with the cutoff of 2025.

IIT Kanpur M.Tech GATE CutOff 2025 (General Category)

IIT Kanpur GATE Cutoff 2025 has been released. In 2025, the cutoff marks for M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering in Round 1 are 750, which is the same as in 2024. For M.Tech Structural Engineering, the cutoff marks are also 500 in 2025.

Tabulated below are IIT Kanpur GATE Cutoff for the General Category.

IIT Kanpur M.Tech Eligibility & Selection Criteria

Particulars Details
Application Process Candidates can apply for GATE on the official website. Later, students satisfying the admission criteria of IIT Kanpur are contacted via email.
Minimum Eligibility Graduation degree in Engineering or Science with 55% Marks in aggregateOrMaster’s Degree in Science with at least 55% Marks in aggregate
Selection Criteria Followed by COAP Counseling is based on the performance in GATE
Seat 736

Is there an interview process for MTech admissions at IIT Kanpur?

No, IIT Kanpur does not have an interview round for MTech admissions. For candidates who have qualified the GATE exam, admission offers are available on the Common Offer Acceptance Portal (COAP). It's necessary for students to register on the COAP portal to view and accept these offers, and the registration is free of charge. Additionally, it's advisable to download the COAP information brochure for complete details. A COAP registration number is required when applying to the IIT Kanpur admission portal for MTech. Those who haven't qualified GATE will be directly contacted by the department via email.

IIT Kanpur offers M.Tech programs in various specializations listed below:

Aerospace Engineering Unmanned Aerial Systems Engineering Artificial Intelligence for Sustainability (Offered by Kotak School of Sustainability) Biological Sciences & Bioengineering
Biomedical Engineering Chemical Engineering Civil Engineering Cognitive Systems
Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) Earth Sciences Electrical Engineering Interdisciplinary Programme on Materials Science
Management Sciences Material Science & Engineering Mechanical Engineering Photonics Science & Engineering
Space, Planetary & Astronomical Sciences & Engineering Sustainable Energy Engineering - -

IIT Kanpur MBA Admission 2025

IIT Kanpur offers MBA programs; the admission procedure, eligibility, and selection criteria are discussed below.

Particulars Details
Application Process Apply for CAT on the iimcat.ac.in. Later, students with a valid CAT score can apply for the program. Selected students will be contacted via email.
Application Fees for CAT INR 2,400 (General Category)
INR 1,200 (SC/ST & PWD)
Minimum Eligibility Bachelor’s degree in any discipline with 60% Marks in aggregate
Selection Criteria CAT Exam Score + Group Discussion followed by Personal Interview

IIT Kanpur Ph.D Admission 2026

IIT Kanpur offers Ph.D in a total of 23 specializations. The admission procedure, eligibility, and selection criteria are discussed below.

Particulars Details
Application Process Interested Candidates can fill out the application form on the official IIT Kanpur website
Application Fee INR 500 (General Category)
INR 250 (SC/ST)
Minimum Eligibility Master’s Degree in Engineering or any relevant program with 55% Marks
Selection Criteria GATE score followed by a written test/ Personal Interview

How do I apply for a Ph.D program at IIT Kanpur? 

If you're looking to apply for the Ph.D program at IIT Kanpur, follow these steps:

  • Step 1: Go to IIT Kanpur's official website and click on 'Apply Now' when the application window opens.
  • Step 2: Register and fill out the application form with your personal and educational details.
  • Step 3: Upload the required documents as specified.
  • Step 4: Pay the application fee to complete your application submission.

Are there scholarships available for students at IIT Kanpur?

IIT Kanpur offers various scholarships to support talented students. The Merit-cum-Means Scholarship, the Free Basic Mess Scholarship, Sports Scholarship, and the Donor Scholarships are some of them offered by the institute.

  • Merit-cum-Means Scholarship: This scholarship offers a monthly pocket allowance of INR 1,000 during the course of the program, along with a complete tuition fee waiver. It is given out according to financial need and merit, and recipients must keep their CPI at least 6.5.
  • Donor Scholarships: Students who exhibit both financial need and academic excellence are eligible for these scholarships.

IIT Kanpur provides several scholarship opportunities for its students, rewarding both academic excellence and sports achievements. Here's a complete breakdown of the available scholarships:

Scholarship Name Amount Eligibility Criteria
Merit-Cum-Means Scholarships Full tuition waiver plus INR 1,000 monthly allowance / free basic mess and INR 250 monthly allowance Parents' income within INR 6 LPA; maintain a CPI of 6.5
Merit-Cum-Means Scholarships by IIT Kanpur Alumni INR 2,000 per month for 10 months Parents' income within INR 4.50 LPA
National Prizes for UG Students Certificate and INR 400 cash prize for the top 7% of students each year Minimum CPI of 8.5
Sports Scholarships INR 500 per month for nine months; Medal winners in inter IIT sports receive INR 1,500, INR 1,000, and INR 500 for Gold, Silver, and Bronze respectively Outstanding performance in sports

Note: This information is based on official sources and may change.

IIT Kanpur Admission 2026 FAQs

Ques. How to get admission to IIT Kanpur in 2025?

Ans. IIT Kanpur offers UG, PG, and Ph.D programs. To get admission, students need to fulfill the eligibility criteria according to the respective program. For B.Tech/B.S. programs, admissions are conducted based on the JEE Advanced score, followed by seat allotment through JoSAA counseling. For M.Tech admissions, Valid GATE scores and COAP counseling rounds determine the final placements. M.Sc, MBA, and Ph.D admission criteria rely on IIT JAM/CAT/GATE/NET-JRF score, followed by various counseling rounds

Ques. Is it possible to secure direct admission to IIT Kanpur?

Ans. No, admission to all programs at IIT Kanpur is solely determined by merit scored in entrance exams. Candidates must pass the JEE Advanced exam in order to enroll in BTech programs. They must first pass the JEE Main exam. IIT Kanpur offers degrees such as BSc, BS, MTech, MSc, MDes, MBA, and various Dual Degree options in addition to its primary program. The results of entrance exams such as GATE, IIT JAM, CEED, and CAT determine admission to these programs. Additionally, entrance exams are used to determine admission to PhD programs in a variety of fields.

Ques. What is the recent trend in cutoff ranks for BTech in Chemical Engineering at IIT Kanpur?

Ans. Over the past few years, the cutoff trend for IIT Kanpur's BTech in Chemical Engineering has been declining. The General category's closing rank fell from 3903 in 2024 to 3942 in 2025. Similarly, the rank shifted from 1966 to 1860 for the OBC category and from 1165 to 1131 for the SC category. The ST category saw a shift from 684 to 718, and for EWS, it was slightly adjusted from 673 to 696. This trend might continue as the demand for engineering courses in India rises. Female candidates have experienced a similar trend, although their ranks differ slightly.

Ques. What is the minimum rank for IIT Kanpur?

Ans. To get admission to IIT Kanpur, UG students opting for B.Tech CSE programs need to have a JEE Advanced Rank of 248 or lower. The closing cutoff for CSE in 2024 was 252.

Ques. What JEE Advanced rank is needed for admission to IIT Kanpur in Civil or Mechanical Engineering?

Ans. Candidates in the General AI category needed a rank of 2776 in order to be admitted to IIT Kanpur for the BTech in Civil Engineering program. The cutoff rank for the same category for the BTech in Mechanical Engineering was 10498. The necessary cutoff rank for candidates in the OBC AI category was 1392 for mechanical engineering and 2764 for civil engineering.

Ques. Is it possible to get into IIT Kanpur for a BTech program with a JEE Advanced rank between 10,000 and 15,000?

Ans. The cut-off rank for a B.Sc. in Chemistry in Round 6 for the general category under the All India quota was 11,824, which is within this range. It is difficult to gain admission with a rank below this if you are not in a reserved category. Higher rankings undoubtedly increase your chances of getting in, even though IIT Kanpur's cut-offs change with each admissions round.

Ques. What entrance exam do I need to take for MDes admission at IIT Kanpur?

Ans. To apply for the MDes program at IIT Kanpur, you need to take the CEED exam. It's important to meet the CEED Cutoff for 2024 at IIT Kanpur. For admission cutoffs, the mean score is 41.90, and the standard deviation is 16.72 for CEED Part A. 

Ques. Is it possible to get into IIT Kanpur for a BTech program with a rank between 0 and 5000?

Ans. The cut-off rank in Round 6 for the BTech in Computer Science and Engineering at IIT Kanpur was 238 for the general category under the All India quota. If you fall within this rank range, especially if you belong to the general category, your chances are slim unless you have a better rank. Candidates may have a better chance, though, if they fall into a different category or have a special domicile status. A higher rank will undoubtedly increase your chances of getting admitted to IIT Kanpur, but keep in mind that cut-off ranks can change with each round.

Ques. What IIT JAM rank is needed for MSc admission at IIT Kanpur?

Ans. Candidates must achieve the specified scores on the IIT JAM exam in order to be admitted to IIT Kanpur's MSc programs. The most competitive category is General All India, where the cutoff rank for the M.Sc. in Statistics is 50 in all four rounds. With cutoff ranks of 181 in round 1 and 226 in round 4, the M.Sc. in Mathematics program is less competitive. Therefore, you must have a rank up to 226 in order to be eligible. Students performance in IIT JAM and subsequent participation in the IIT JAM counseling process will determine their admission. The only people eligible for admission consideration are those on the JAM 2025 merit list.

Ques. What is the admission process for the MTech program at IIT Kanpur?

Ans. Candidates must have finished a four-year science course or an engineering bachelor's degree in order to be admitted to IIT Kanpur's M.Tech program. A master's degree in science with the necessary minimum scores is also acceptable. For SC/ST/PwD candidates, there is a 0.5 CPI relaxation or a 5% relaxation in aggregate marks. A valid GATE score is necessary for regular applicants. However, if a candidate has a cumulative CPI of at least 6.5 and a CPI of 8.0 in the final two years of their degree, they can be exempt from the GATE requirement if they have a BTech/BS (4-year) degree from an IIT.

Ques. What are the branch-wise cutoff ranks for the SC category at IIT Kanpur?

Ans. In the final round, IIT Kanpur's SC category cutoff for 2025 varied from 70 to 2835. BS in Chemistry was the least competitive, while a BTech in Computer Science and Engineering was the most. The cutoff ranks for different branches for candidates in the SC category for 2025 are displayed in the following table:

Courses Round 1 Round 5
B.Tech Aerospace Engineering 1058 1062
B.Tech Biological Sciences and Bio-Engineering 2117 2177
B.Tech Chemical Engineering 1131 1138
B.Tech Civil Engineering 1560 1561
B.Tech Computer Science Engineering 70 70
B.Tech Electrical Engineering 422 429
B.Tech Material Science Engineering 1922 1922
B.Tech Mechanical Engineering 787 792
BS Chemistry 2645 2835
BS Earth Sciences 2408 2541
BS Economics 1305 1305
BS Mathematics and Scientific Computing 413 505
BS Physics 1972 2182
BS Statistics and Data Science 458 458

IIT Kanpur Admissions: Students' Opinion

  • BTech
  • M.Sc
  • Mtech
  • BS

AI-Generated Summary based on 303 Reviews

Admission to the B.Tech program in Biological Sciences and Bio-Engineering at IIT Kanpur is based on the JEE Advanced examination. Candidates must first qualify in the JEE Mains exam to be eligible for JEE Advanced. A minimum of 75% in Class 12 boards is required to apply for JEE Mains. The cutoff rank for B.Tech admission typically ranges up to 8000. The admission is conducted through JoSAA counselling, where candidates are allotted seats based on their JEE Advanced ranks and preferences.

Reservations are available for categories such as SC, ST, OBC, and EWS, and there are also supernumerary seats for female candidates. Application forms for JEE Mains can be found on the NTA website, usually released in November, while JEE Advanced forms are available on the official JEE Advanced site. Counseling includes multiple rounds, typically taking about a month, where students confirm or 'float' their provisional seats before receiving acceptance letters.

The process is streamlined and mostly online, although improvements are suggested in communication and document verification. The cutoff rank requirements vary for different categories, influencing the intake process. IIT Kanpur, recognized for its strong academic reputation and extensive alumni network, is a preferred choice among candidates based on rank and preference.

What is the IIT Kanpur branch-wise cutoff for general category?

RaviB.Tech student at IIT Kanpur

IIT Kanpur is one of the 6 oldest IITs, and an ‘Institute of National Importance’. Admission into B.Tech at IIT Kanpur is based on JEE Advanced results, followed by JoSAA counselling. 

The JEE Advanced 2024 cutoff is not yet released. However, here is the JEE Advanced cutoff 2023 for admission at IIT Kanpur (for open category & gender-neutral seats, round 1)- 

JEE Advanced 2023 Cutoff for IIT Kanpur (Round 1):

Branch Name Opening Rank Closing Rank
Aerospace Engineering 2316 3754
Biological Sciences and Bioengineering 5576 7520
Chemical Engineering 2990 4097
Civil Engineering 4295 5933
Computer Science and Engineering 118 215
Electrical Engineering 539 1305
Materials Science and Engineering 4644 6405
Mechanical Engineering 1769 2844

For more information on the previous year JEE Advanced cutoff, you can visit the official JoSAA website- https://josaa.admissions.nic.in/applicant/SeatAllotmentResult/CurrentORCR.aspx

What is IIT Kanpur PhD admission 2024 last date?

Bhoomika YadavIIT Kanpur

The last date to apply for PhD admission at IIT Kanpur for the July 2024 semester was April 12, 2024. This was the final deadline provided by the institute with no further chances of extension. 

The PhD programs at IIT Kanpur are highly regarded for their excellent academic standards and research opportunities. PhD scholars get the benefit of extensive resources, dedicated supervisors, conference support and more. The institute offers PhD programs in more than 10 disciplines. 

Along with the general application form, the candidates are also required to provide 2 letters of reference with the referee's name and email ID provided. They will be provided to submit their recommendations.

What is the process for IIT Kanpur MTech admission 2024?

Sushil YadavStudies at IIT Kanpur

The admission process followed by IIT Kanpur is similar to the admission process followed by all the other IITs. The main thing that you need to keep in mind is that in India to take admission in most of the colleges, appearing for GATE Examination is mandatory. Similarly, for IIT Kanpur as well to take admission to MTech, you will have to appear for the GATE examination and secure a high rank to be eligible for counseling. You will need to qualify the GATE examination and register at COAP for admission in the course. Try to secure a high rank as the competition is very high and seats for MTech in the IITs is limited. So, only the top-ranking students get the chance to study at IIT Kanpur every year. If you want to be one of them, then study hard.

0

What is the IIT Kanpur MBA cut-off?

Suresh KhemkaStudies at IIT Kanpur

The MBA cut-off from IIT Kanpur is 95+ percentile. IIT Kanpur accepts CAT scores primarily for admission to their MBA courses. However, the specific cut-off required for MBA admission may vary from year to year and is majorly determined by IIT Kanpur based on different factors like the number of students applying and the overall performance score of the students in the test. You can directly go to the official website of IIT Kanpur to check the details or easily connect with the admission office of IIT Kanpur to get accurate and updated information regarding the cut-offs for the MBA course. IIT Kanpur looks for students with good educational backgrounds and work experiences apart from their CAT scores. The performance in the GD and PI also plays an important role in the final selection process.

What are the Emasters programs offered by IIT Kanpur?

Shiddhi Singh

IIT Kanpur offers 14 distinct e-Masters programs through various departments to its students. Candidates for this program must have a Bachelor's or Master's degree in the relevant discipline with at least 55% marks (5.5/10 CPI) and at least 2 years of work experience. The different e-Masters programs that the institution offers are listed below:

Program

Departments

Eligibility Criteria

Next Generation Wireless Technologies

Electrical Engineering

Bachelor's Degree (3/4 years program) or a Masters Degree in the relevant discipline with at least 55% marks or 5.5/10 CPI.

AND

Minimum of 2 years of work experience (You need not be currently employed to be eligible).

AND 

Candidates with relevant experience will be preferred.

Business Finance

Economic Sciences

Financial Technology & Management

Management Sciences (DoMS)

Public Policy

Economic Sciences

Data Science and Business Analytics

Management Sciences (DoMS)

Cyber Security

Computer Science and Engineering

Climate Finance and Sustainability

Economic Sciences

Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning

Electrical Engineering

Quantitative Finance and Risk Management

Management Sciences (DoMS)

Sustainable Construction Practices and Project Management

Civil Engineering

Business Leadership in the Digital Age

Economic Sciences

Financial Analysis

Economic Sciences

Power Sector Regulation, Economics and Management

Management Sciences (DoMS)

Renewable Energy and e-Mobility

Sustainable Energy Engineering

How do I take admission to learn a foreign language from IIT-Kanpur?

Vijay SarnaikStudied at IIT Kanpur

Initially, the Department of HSS of IIT Kanpur offered the Foreign language program(FLP). However, due to recent changes, it is now taught under the Dean of Students' Affairs.

Duration: 2 semesters

Languages taught: French, German, Japanese languages 

Admission process: 

  • The applications to get enrolled in this program are sent out in July every year. 
  • These applications can be downloaded from the Dean of Student Affairs (DoSA) IIT Kanpur homepage or collected personally from its office.
  • Fill out the application form and send it to the DOSA office and you will be given admission based on the order of receipt of applications.

The admission process is quite simple and one needs to make the decision as soon as possible because your application will not be considered if the seats are filled.

...Read More

0

What should a non-genius student do to get a seat at IIT Kanpur CS?

Aditi Roylives in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

It’s good that you have a target in your mind and aren’t leaving everything to luck. The best way for a non-genius student to get a seat at IIT Kanpur's Computer Science program is to work hard and consistently. Rather than stating the usual; solving previous year question papers, joining good coaching institutes, coordinating school with coaching classes, and self-study, I will talk about some of the most basic things that people often undermine 

  • Whenever you feel you are falling into a slump, remind yourself that there are hundreds of students who want you to fail in order to grab your position. Remind yourself of this continuously and you will find yourself out of that bubble.
  • It’s important to assess your own abilities and be honest with yourself rather than being overconfident. I have seen people who are confident with their academics end up with poor grades. Don’t undermine yourself but don’t even overestimate yourself. Remember you are surrounded by geniuses.
  • Don’t get addicted to useless stuff and activities that waste your time. Instead, go for a walk or read for a break.
  • You should have prepared yourself mentally and physically for the sacrifices you have to make and the efforts you have to invest.
  • Study books that make you understand the concepts in a simpler manner yet give you a comprehensive understanding.
  • Motivate yourself with the possible outcome and the reaction of your family. Keep yourself reminded of the happiness and success will harbor.

I would like to end the answer on a final note: There are no non-geniuses, just bad students who do not pay attention in class and bad teachers who do not teach well.

...Read More
